recommendations.title: Donnie Darko
recommendations.overview: After narrowly escaping a bizarre accident, a troubled teenager is plagued by visions of a large bunny rabbit that manipulates him to commit a series of crimes.

recommendations.title: Everyone Says I Love You
recommendations.overview: A New York girl sets her father up with a beautiful woman in a shaky marriage while her half sister gets engaged.

recommendations.title: Big Miracle
recommendations.overview: A small-town news reporter and a Greenpeace volunteer enlist the help of rival superpowers to save three majestic gray whales trapped under the ice of the Arctic Circle.

recommendations.title: Pacifiction
recommendations.overview: Island of Tahiti. French government official De Roller is a calculating man with impeccable manners, capable of dealing with both high society and the locals he frequents in shady joints.

recommendations.title: Searching for Sugar Man
recommendations.overview: Two South Africans set out to discover what happened to their unlikely musical hero, the mysterious 1970s rock 'n' roller, Rodriguez.

recommendations.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
recommendations.overview: An alien is left behind on Earth and saved by the 10-year-old Elliott who decides to keep him hidden in his home. While a task force hunts for the extra-terrestrial, Elliott, his brother, and his little sister Gertie form an emotional bond with their

recommendations.title: Love Everlasting
recommendations.overview: Bridger is a young outsider who's always wanted more. He and his mother flee an abusive home, eventually finding a small town in the middle of nowhere. Once there, Bridger finds true acceptance with another misfit.

recommendations.title: Grey Gardens

recommendations.title: Altered States

recommendations.title: Wayne's World 2
